full_text:
Sun Xin 孫歆
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Xin (孫歆). In command of navy, lured out by Du Yu. Met the attack of Zhou Zhi but was killed. Sun Xin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Xin lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
